tasks.description: List all Python files in the graphbot project directory and count how many there are
Read the file CLAUDE.md and summarize the architecture in 3 bullet points
Search for all TODO comments in Python files in the core_gb directory
Read pyproject.toml and list all dependencies with their version constraints
Search the web for 'Kuzu graph database alternatives 2026' and summarize the top 3 results
Run the command 'python -m pytest tests/ --co -q' and count how many tests are collected
Search the web for 'free LLM API providers 2026' and compare the top 5 providers by rate limits
Run 'git log --oneline -10' and summarize what the last 10 commits changed
List all files in the tools_gb directory and explain what each tool does based on the filenames
Search the web for 'recursive DAG execution LLM agents' and list 3 relevant papers or projects
